name: DNC War Room
subject: re: what Trump confirmed this morning
body:
Stand with Democrats
---
**Add your name to tell Congress to vote for an independent investigation into Trump's ties to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Russia-Vote2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2&source=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2")**
Friend --

When news broke last night that Donald Trump put our national security at risk by revealing highly classified information to the Russian government, top-level administration officials including the Secretary of State and National Security Advisor insisted the reports were wrong.

This morning, Trump tweeted -- even bragged -- that he'd done exactly what he was accused of doing.

We've seen this movie before. After Trump fired James Comey, his administration scrambled to find a justification that wasn't related to the FBI's investigation into Trump and Russia. Then, Trump admitted on television that he was thinking about how the Russia investigation should be over when he fired Comey.

If Trump weren't president, his dangerous disclosure to Russia could end with him in handcuffs.

Instead, it's up to Congress to hold Trump accountable -- and we know we can't trust Republicans like Paul Ryan to put aside politics and do the right thing for our country.

So Democrats are taking action. Tomorrow, House Democrats will demand an on-the-record vote to create an independent panel to investigate Trump's ties to Russia.

**We can't let the corrupt Trump administration and its allies in Congress get in the way of the truth. Add your name to stand with Democrats and tell Congress to vote for an independent investigation into Trump and Russia:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Russia-Vote2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2&source=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2")**
Thanks for taking action,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce30/4067b0a/2f84a40c1/7e779bbc/1038174918/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2&source=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce30/4067b0a/2f84a40c1/7e779bbd/1038174918/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2&source=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce30/4067b0a/2f84a40c1/7e779bba/1038174918/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2&source=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce30/4067b0a/2f84a40c1/7e779bbb/1038174918/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2&source=em_20170516_dnc2_nd2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Hey, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
Friend, I need your help - America needs your help - right now. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)
---
Friend,

I know you're busy, so I'll make this quick...

Montana's Special Election is less than two weeks away and I don't have to tell you how incredibly important this election is to all Republicans. The Left - _being led by Nancy Pelosi, Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders_ - is literally spending millions of dollars trying to convince Montanans to elect a far left radical in a cowboy hat.

**Friend, I need your help - America needs your help - right now.**

| [** I SUPPORT GREG! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)
---

Greg Gianforte is a solid Conservative who will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and the liberal media and fight for the values of faith, family and freedom.

Across the country, Democrats and the liberal Left are looking to win Special Elections, hoping to show that the conservative movement can be defeated - and embarrass President Trump. **Friend, they will stop at nothing to win the Montana Special Election. They see this as their best opportunity for a Democrat win in 2017!**

**[This is why I am asking you for a personal favor. Will you stand with Greg on Election Day, May 25th?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)**

The Liberal Political Machine, along with George Soros-funded special interest groups, have launched an all-out attack. They are pouring millions into this race not only to defeat Greg, but also to sabotage the Trump agenda that you and I fought for last November.

[** I SUPPORT GREG! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)
---

_Friend, we can't lose this election!_

**[So right now, I'm going to personally ask if you will please chip in your most generous gift of $25, $50, or more to Greg's campaign?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)**

It's true that we may have a majority in Washington, but we always need more conservative allies in Congress. Greg has pledged to help bring real change to "the swamp" by:
* Fighting for our constitutional right to bear and keep arms;
* Protecting American energy jobs and stop job-killing regulations from the radical Left;
* Fighting to protect our borders and strengthen our military, keeping our nation safe from those who want to hurt our way of life.

**[Friend, your support in this Special Election is critical to ensuring a conservative victory on May 25th- just 9 days away!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)**

Thank you in advance for your commitment to our nation.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
United States Senator -- TX

P.S. Democrats see this Special Election as their best opportunity to embarrass our President. They think if they can defeat Greg Gianforte in Montana, they will gain momentum for the 2018 midterm elections. As a fellow conservative, I hope you won't let that happen. **[Friend, please join me in supporting Greg for Congress by chipping in $10 or more today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)**

[** I SUPPORT GREG! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42309396:W969Nh2-N:m:1:1494336505:6AB56D5BD8500746741D910EB69B71FE:r)
---

| Paid for by Greg for Montana
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system January 17, 2017.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW969Nh2-N). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW969Nh2-N)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: The biggest disgrace yet.
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85dab7/1644501594/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Friends, When I was in the House, I served on the Intelligence Committee. I was privy to classified information -- and I kept it classified. I viewed it as one of the most important parts of my job. **Apparently Donald Trump doesn 't feel the same way. Last night, _The Washington Post_ reported that our president shared highly classified information with Russian diplomats while they were meeting INSIDE the Oval Office.** There is so much work Congress must do to get to the bottom of this latest bombshell. But unfortunately the partisanship of too many members prevents them from doing what's right for our country. That's why I'm fighting harder than ever to get true leaders in Congress in 2018. _**[Please join me: Rush in a grassroots donation to help us take back the House next year.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85dab0/1644501594/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?refcode=link1")**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _**[Rush in $10 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85dab1/1644501594/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10")**_ _**[Rush in $25 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85dab2/1644501594/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25")**_ _**[Rush in $50 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85dab3/1644501594/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50")**_ _**[Rush in $100 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85daac/1644501594/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100")**_ _**[Or, rush in another amount](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85daad/1644501594/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?refcode=express_lane_other")**_ Our country is in crisis mode. I need your help to elect members of Congress who will lead us out of this mess and restore faith in our political system. Thank you for fighting alongside me. Patrick Murphy [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85daae/1644501594/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170516pem?refcode=button") |
Paid for by PEM PAC | [http://www.pempac.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85daaf/1644501594/VEsP/ "http://www.pempac.com") | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edc/738133e4/2cdd548c/7f85daa8/1644501594/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Leila McDowell, EMILY's List
subject: 13 men making decisions about women's health care 😡
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57454/2590070151/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact")
---

Peter,

There's no doubt about it: Trumpcare will hit women the hardest.

Currently, Trumpcare defunds Planned Parenthood, slashes Medicaid, and removes protections for so-called "pre-existing conditions" like being a rape survivor and having a C-section.

So who's responsible for crafting the companion bill in the Senate? Why, a group of men, of course.

That's right: 13 Republican men -- including our pals Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz, and Tom Cotton -- and ZERO women will have a say in repealing Obamacare. Republicans didn't even include Lisa Murkowski or Susan Collins, two Republican women who actually serve on the Senate health committee, unlike Cruz and Cotton.

**[Let's show Republicans that shutting women out of decisions about health care-- whether it's legislation or choices in their doctor's office -- comes at a cost. Donate $3 to help defeat anti-woman Republicans and elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57455/2590070151/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170515_email_WorkingGroup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Lets+show+Republicans+that+shutting+wome&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57456/2590070151/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170515_email_WorkingGroup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact")
Here's the cherry on top: Republican leaders are actually DEFENDING the composition of the working group rather than committing to change it.

An aide to Mitch McConnell said, "So you can get caught up in process, or you can focus on the actual reality."

Senator John Cornyn called the issue of an all-men group "totally bogus." Another GOP aide said, "We have no interest in playing the games of identity politics."

**Missing the point much?**

It's not about optics or process. This bill would shatter health care access, affordability, and coverage for women across the country -- low-income women and women of color in particular.

That's exactly why we fight to make sure women have a seat at the decision-making table.

**Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women who will defend health care:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defend-Health-Care](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57457/2590070151/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170515_email_WorkingGroup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefendHealthCare&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact")**

Thanks,

Leila McDowell
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57450/2590070151/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170515_email_WorkingGroup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57451/2590070151/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57452/2590070151/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78ee/24c69fd9/ebeb8d3b/18e57453/2590070151/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact&source=WQEFE519N_digital_email_20170516_WorkingGroup_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Tom Perez
subject: We're launching something big - make sure you're part of it
body:
Be a part of Resistance Summer.
---
**Sign up today to learn how you can get involved with Resistance Summer.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resistance-Summer2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2")**

Friend --

The most important day of this year wasn't January 20th. It was January 21st -- when hundreds of thousands of people marched on Washington at the Women's March and millions more stood up across the country and around the world and said that we would not be silenced.

Since that day, Americans have made it clear that we will resist Donald Trump and the GOP's agenda -- by marching at airports, showing up at town halls, and demanding action from our elected representatives. As Democrats, our task is to translate that energy and activism into votes, so we can replace complicit Republicans in Congress and state legislatures with Democrats who will resist with us.

**[Today, we're launching a new, nationwide program that will help ensure we do just that. It's called Resistance Summer, and I want you to be a part of it.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resistance-Summer2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Today+were+launching+a+new+nationwide+pr&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2")**

Resistance Summer is all about local, on-the-ground organizing from the grassroots up. In a few weeks, we're holding our first-ever nationwide organizing training in Detroit, bringing together organizers from all 57 states and territories and equipping them with the tools and resources they need to elect Democrats up and down the ticket.

Then, together with state Democratic parties like yours in Virginia, we'll get to work educating, organizing, and mobilizing voters in communities across the country to resist Donald Trump's attacks on hardworking families and win at the polls in 2017 and beyond.

This is how we get back to basics -- organizing in every zip code to elect Democrats who share our values. But in order to build a truly grassroots movement that will propel our candidates to victory, we need our best supporters like you to stay active and involved.

**Sign up now, and we'll make sure you're one of the first to know how to get involved with Resistance Summer events near you:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resistance-Summer2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2")**
Thanks -- more to come soon.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce46/4067b0a/287c136ed/7e778385/4202239130/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce46/4067b0a/287c136ed/7e778382/4202239130/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce46/4067b0a/287c136ed/7e778383/4202239130/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce46/4067b0a/287c136ed/7e778380/4202239130/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170516_tp_nd2&source=em_20170516_tp_nd2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

It was January 21st -- when hundreds of thousands of people marched on Washington at the Women's March and millions more stood up across the country and around the world and said that we would not be silenced. Since that day, Americans have made it clear that we will resist Donald Trump and the GOP's agenda -- by marching at airports, showing up at town halls, and demanding action from our elected representatives. As Democrats, our task is to translate that energy and activism into votes, so we can replace complicit Republicans in Congress and state legislatures with Democrats who will resist with us. "" Resistance Summer is all about local, on-the-ground organizing from the grassroots up. In a few weeks, we're holding our first-ever nationwide organizing training in Detroit, bringing together organizers from all 57 states and territories and equipping them with the tools and resources they need to elect Democrats up and down the ticket. Then, together with state Democratic parties like yours in Virginia, we'll get to work educating, organizing, and mobilizing voters in communities across the country to resist Donald Trump's attacks on hardworking families and win at the polls in 2017 and beyond. This is how we get back to basics -- organizing in every zip code to elect Democrats who share our values. But in order to build a truly grassroots movement that will propel our candidates to victory, we need our best supporters like you to stay active and involved. name: ALERT (via FlaDems.com)
subject: Trump did what with the Russians!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
[**SIGN ON: DEMAND A REAL INDEPENDENT INVESTIGATION INTO DONALD TRUMP 'S TIES TO RUSSIA.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a0/1a5213b3/76594507/718bb162/1644968905/VEsH/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-an-independent-investigation-today?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+ON+DEMAND+A+REAL+INDEPENDENT+INVEST&utm_campaign=em051617")
Friend,

It's time to get to the truth. In fact, it's way past time.

Every day, more and more leaks out about Russian interference and influence in our government. **Every. Single. Day.**

Now we've just learned President Trump shared highly classified information during an Oval Office meeting with the Russian foreign minister.

[**Add your name here and demand an independent investigation with full authority to find the truth.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a0/1a5213b3/76594507/718bb15d/1644968905/VEsE/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-an-independent-investigation-today?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+and+demand+an+indepen&utm_campaign=em051617")

Marco Rubio and the GOP are nowhere to be found. Their silence is deafening.

We can't let the Republicans get away with political cowardice, however.

**That 's why we're calling on Rubio and Florida Republicans to join us in calling for an immediate independent investigation.**

If there is one thing we should be able to agree upon across the aisle, it's this: Floridians deserve to know the truth about Donald Trump and his Russian connections.

[**Add your name here to support an independent investigation.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a0/1a5213b3/76594507/718bb15c/1644968905/VEsF/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-an-independent-investigation-today?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+here+to+support+an+indepen&utm_campaign=em051617")

Thanks for all you do,

FlaDems.com

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a0/1a5213b3/76594507/718bb15f/1644968905/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em051617&source=em051617") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Caroline Hall, RoyCooper.com
subject: Our right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Let's celebrate yesterday's win for voting rights, but let's never lose sight of the fact that we have to continue to work to protect the right to vote.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f8f/2fde7c66/43ef88a4/156903f0/2764162136/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Yesterday, we got a big win in our fight for voting rights when the Supreme Court declined to hear an appeal that could have reinstated the harmful Republican voter access law. But, as Roy said today, this is just a temporary win. We know that Republicans in the legislature will soon try to pass another law that suppresses our right to vote. **[As governor, Roy will continue to protect the right to vote in North Carolina, but he can't do it alone. Chip in today and let Roy know you have his back.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f8f/2fde7c66/43ef88a4/156903f0/2764162136/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** This Republican legislature has an awful track record on voting rights. They targeted African Americans "with almost surgical precision" and tried to make it harder to vote. Their electoral maps are so gerrymandered that they were told they have to go back and redraw them because they were illegal. We know what we're up against here. So let's celebrate yesterday's win for voting rights, but let's never lose sight of the fact that we have to continue to work to protect that right to vote. **[Chip in and help Roy protect the right to vote.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f8f/2fde7c66/43ef88a4/156903f0/2764162136/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for your help, Caroline Hall
Cooper for North Carolina
| | [**Chip in today ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f8f/2fde7c66/43ef88a4/156903f0/2764162136/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170516_voting2_fnd_gq_ful__ch&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
